params.name: Scorpio
params.description:
As I, the writer, stare at the shiny icon and contemplate about its unique effect, I recall how this Relic was obtained. Instead of coming up with a proper description, I just want to say:
Truth is a nugget not grown but found,
When all that's false is washed and drowned.
